---
title: "My talks and presentations"
---

I really enjoy talking about my work and about science in general. Here is a list of slides I used for my conference talks and invited lectures, as well as other resources. If you attended some of my talks and missed a reference to a paper or a figure, you can track them down here.



## Invited talks

### 2022

#### **New stories of old DNA**

"_Biological Thursdays_" seminar series (**in Czech**)

- [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B2jrgnjNqC0) (talk)
- [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7fCkHfcCDtc) (discussion)


## Courses

### 2022


## Conference presentations


## Interviews and podcasts

### 2020


#### podcast interview

- [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bq1RI3AbIso)


## Popular articles

- [The Next Piece of Our Big Genetic Puzzle](https://www.anthropology-news.org/articles/the-next-piece-of-our-big-genetic-puzzle/), _Anthropology News_ issue on Genetics (2021)
